entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis hypogaea L. evaluated for genetic variability and trait associations.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic variation observed among the groundnut genotypes.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation that is due to genetic factors.

entities.name: GENETIC ADVANCE
entities.description: The expected genetic gain resulting from the selection of superior genotypes.

entities.name: NORMAL GROWING ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The control growing condition without imposed drought stress.

entities.name: MID-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress imposed during the middle of the growing season.

entities.name: END OF SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress imposed during the end of the growing season.

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENT
entities.description: The experimental method used to evaluate genotypes in a field setting.

entities.name: KARNATAKA, INDIA
entities.description: The geographical location where the field experiment was conducted.

entities.name: CROP GROWTH RATE
entities.description: A physiological trait measuring the rate of overall crop growth.

entities.name: POD GROWTH RATE
entities.description: A physiological trait measuring the rate of pod development.

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: A physiological trait measuring the nitrogen concentration per unit of leaf area.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The total yield of pods produced by the groundnut plant.

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: A physiological trait representing the ratio of leaf area to leaf dry mass.

entities.name: 100-KERNEL WEIGHT
entities.description: A yield trait measuring the weight of 100 kernels.

entities.name: SOUND MATURE KERNEL PERCENTAGE
entities.description: A yield trait measuring the percentage of kernels that are fully developed and sound.
